scope_boundary: synthetic self-improvement transition-record discipline and finite Lean predicates only; no deployed self-improvement behavior, runtime optimization, evaluator integrity, authority enforcement, rollback execution, regression quality, recursive self-improvement safety, source interpretation, or source-derived support-state promotion
transition_reason: The repository now has a self-improvement-transition schema, a protocol fixture, finite SelfImprovement Lean predicates, proof adequacy review text that keeps the target narrow, exact source mappings for the Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries chapter, and a synthetic self-improvement boundary harness with valid and expected-invalid fixtures. Those artifacts make protected invariants, evaluator separation, cheaper-intervention ordering, authority non-widening, governance review, monitor windows, rollback paths, and no-promotion language executable at the record level. They still do not establish deployed self-improvement behavior, runtime optimization quality, evaluator integrity, authority enforcement, rollback execution, regression quality, source interpretation adequacy, recursive self-improvement safety, or model behavior.
required_artifacts: deployed self-improvement implementation or replayable prototype trace
runtime self-improvement trace showing proposed, rejected, quarantined, canaried, promoted, and rolled-back transitions
authority-enforcement trace showing candidates cannot widen authority without governance grant
security and resource boundary-delta tests over actual transition records
stale-gate replay showing review triggers after frontier, architecture, source, lifecycle, or threat-model changes
rollback dry run or rollback execution over actual implementation state
regression suite over real candidate and prior implementations
monitor-window result over real workload or replay traces
source interpretation review for self-improvement source mappings
accepted upward evidence-transition review for any narrowed stronger claim
verification_command: python3 scripts/validate_self_improvement_boundaries.py && python3 scripts/validate_evidence_transitions.py && python3 scripts/validate_source_evidence_audit.py && python3 scripts/validate_v1_status_snapshot.py
negative_results: Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries remains at argument
schema validation checks transition shape rather than deployed self-improvement behavior
finite Lean predicates remain useful but too narrow for lifecycle, review, timing, adversarial, authority-enforcement, rollback-execution, or regression-quality claims
source interpretation review and model behavior are not implemented
downgrade_triggers: chapter text interpreted as deployed self-improvement evidence
synthetic transition record interpreted as real recursive self-improvement behavior
finite Lean self-improvement predicates treated as deployed safety evidence
promotion_burden: Move above argument only after the claim is narrowed to the synthetic record discipline that passed, or after deployed self-improvement implementation traces, proposed/rejected/quarantined/canaried/promoted/rolled-back transition replays, independent evaluator-integrity review, authority-enforcement traces, security and resource boundary-delta tests, stale-gate replays, rollback dry runs or rollback execution over actual state, regression suites over real implementations, monitor-window results, and source-interpretation review are recorded with accepted evidence-transition records.
limitations: synthetic fixtures do not prove deployed self-improvement behavior
schema validation does not prove runtime optimization quality
finite Lean predicates do not implement self-improvement transitions
evaluator-independence strings do not prove evaluator integrity
rollback path strings do not prove rollback execution
monitor-window strings do not prove regression quality or live monitoring
no independent runtime, formal-methods, evaluator-integrity, self-improvement-safety, rollback, regression, or source-interpretation review has been recorded
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; not an independent runtime-systems, evaluator-integrity, self-improvement-safety, rollback, regression-quality, formal-methods, reviewer-quality, or source-interpretation audit
acceptance_blockers: no authority-enforcement trace over real candidates
no security or resource boundary-delta test over actual transitions
no stale-gate replay over changing frontier, architecture, source, lifecycle, or threat model
no rollback dry run or rollback execution over actual implementation state
no regression suite over real candidate and prior implementations
no monitor-window result over real workload
non_claims: does not promote Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries above argument
does not prove deployed self-improvement behavior
does not prove runtime optimization quality
does not prove evaluator integrity or authority enforcement
does not prove rollback execution, regression quality, or recursive self-improvement safety
